name: Joe Froggers (Soft Molasses Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter.
2. In a small bowl, dissolve salt in water.
3. Add rum.
4. In a pint measuring cup, combine molasses with soda.
5. Sift dry ingredients together.
6. Add liquid ingredients alternately with dry to the butter mixture.
7. Add raisins.
8. Chill dough for at least 12 hours.
9. Divide dough into fourths.
10. Roll about 1/3 inch thick.
11. Cut into 4-inch rounds.
12. Place rounds 2 inches apart on buttered baking sheets.
13. Bake at 375°F until set, 12-15 minutes. Do not overbake.
